property.name: yarn.resourcemanager.webapp.address
property.description: The address of the ResourceManager web application.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.aux-services
property.description: Auxiliary services run by NodeManagers. Essential for MapReduce shuffle.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.memory-mb
property.description: Amount of physical memory (in MB) that can be allocated for YARN containers on this NodeManager.

property.name: yarn.scheduler.minimum-allocation-mb
property.description: The minimum allocation request at the ResourceManager.

property.name: yarn.scheduler.maximum-allocation-mb
property.description: The maximum allocation request at the ResourceManager.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.cpu-vcores
property.description: Number of CPU cores that can be allocated for containers on this NodeManager.

property.name: yarn.log-aggregation-enabled
property.description: Enable log aggregation to aggregate application logs into HDFS upon job completion.

property.name: yarn.log-aggregation.retain-seconds
property.description: How long to keep aggregated logs in HDFS before deleting (7 days).

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.vmem-check-enabled
property.description: Disable virtual memory checks to prevent container termination on lean local dev clusters.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.pmem-check-enabled
property.description: Verify physical memory usage of YARN containers.
